text:
Hardcoding model lists is a very specific kind of pain. We finally stopped doing it.

The dashboards now pull directly from a live model catalog across the ecosystem. When a new model drops, it shows up automatically. No manual updates, no stale dropdowns, no waiting on a PR just to fix a typo in a model name.

PR #11613 is merged and live. The garden updates itself now. 🌱

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #webdev #frontend #machinelearning
